scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:debug: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:debug -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:debug:wsl: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:debug:wsl -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
